reviews.review_title: One of the best experiences I’ve had
reviews.review_description: Now if you get play this game yourself and with no friends you won’t have as much fun as you would expect but if you have a buddy to play this with it so extremely fun and I promise you will make tons of memories playing this game with your friends.
This game is so addictive I doubted it at first but it turned out to ball to be really fun it also one of the best multiplayer games I have ever played!
i cant find a server i put 6767 12345 and still nothing

This game is great, it's unique and stands out on it's own but i am genuinely curious as to why updates just stopped. I know it's been 3 years since the last one but i just recently played this and have gotten next to everything there is to unlock and craft. This game is perfectly rated and i feel like it could've been higher than a 4.3 if they continued adding more content to it. I hope y'all come back to this game and add more stuff and maybe fix some bugs, although they aren't game breaking, so i wonder lower my rating for it.

I love this game and want to play it with my kids or my husband and unable to create multiplayer. It will not give me a room code. Very frustrating because my husband has Alzheimer’s and he wants to play but I can’t get it to work.

The Dolphin, which I guess is the tutorial, glitches and does not show the next step. Figured out I need to make a cup, then cutting board. No matter what I do, I die before getting to the cutting board.
Dolphin mocks you from the distance, refusing to redo the intro, just watching as you slowly descend into a spiral of frustration and dolphin hate.
I hope a tuna net snags it.
This is really good survival game sadly it's not in development
I love this game but it needs a update
I love this game. But every time I get on my world everything deletes. Except for my builds

the game is too simple, easy, monotonous, pointless stuff, there is no development, all interest ends from the moment the islands are opened, because this is the maximum achievement in the game. after that there is nothing new, the game is too boring.

I feel as if it should have a offline mode I understand it was my fault for not reviewing it before buying it but even if I did have internet I would still write this review I just think y'all should give us a option on if we play offline or online 1 star because I don't have internet but once I play it I'll re-review it

This game has about 2-3 hours playability for each raft you make. You can’t expect to build a base either because of the material coming in at such a slow rate.

So basically materials float to your raft and you collect and expand your raft, but you can only expand to a certain point til you reach a limit with how much progress you can make because of how limited the materials come in.

The loot comes in at the same rate all the time, the bigger/longer the raft doesn’t increase the amount of material in the ocean. The materials only stay about 10 tiles to the very east of your base. 

I just ask for the devs to make it so while you progress your base it also progresses the material you get at a faster rate. Make it so the Material doesn’t just stay on the same 10 tiles. It makes the game pointless and you can’t build anything.
I bought it for 10$ and don’t even get to play the full￼ version.

reviews.review_title: I really enjoy this game, but…..
reviews.review_description: I understand this game is still under development, and bound to have bugs here and there.   I went to answer the door and when I came back my crate was empty, my water cup was gone (and I really need that for those darn rain clouds) and the supplies I was gathering on the workbench gone.  Several hours of play pooof gone at the ring of the bell.  Other then that 💜

developer_response.body:
Hi SonDra_.
We fixed this bug with the new update and are sorry for the problems it caused.

reviews.review_description: This game is super fun. Me and my friend have been playing for about two hours now. I understand this is still in beta but i have some recommendations. 1. Make the shark do something. Either attack your boat or you are able to kill it for meat. 2. I would love to see other abandoned rafts floating around or even islands. Just an idea but what if you could use rope and tape to make the range on the hook longer? This is a great game and i totally recommend it. This is still in beta so it is still 5 stars, must play.
My grappler won’t open and othe reasons

reviews.review_title: Love it, just needs a few updates
reviews.review_description: I thoroughly enjoy playing this game with family and am super excited for future content updates. However, having to rely on having the pirates or the rain cloud spawn every 20 minutes when you need materials for the pirate ship is kind of frustrating, it leads to what could be hours of downtime which isn't fun when you've completed everything else.
Me and my friend looked at good games and this one didn’t look the best but when you get into it is amazing considering it’s in its beta as well and very cheap
